title: ctenopterella pediculata
intro: Ctenopterella pediculata, also known as the Hooked Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopterella pediculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. It can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of a poultice or salve.
